ssl_viewer.geometry¶

Functions

bearing_deg_from_en(east_m, north_m)

endpoint_from_array_az_el(lon0, lat0, ...)

Convert planar-array az/el to a world-space ray endpoint.

heading_unit(heading_deg)

0 deg = north, 90 deg = east, clockwise positive.

make_arrow_polygon(lon0, lat0, heading_deg, ...)

offset_m_to_lnglat(lon0, lat0, east_m, north_m)

pos_from_forward_right(lon0, lat0, ...[, z_m])

pos_from_local_en(lon0, lat0, east_m, north_m)

wrap_360(x)

ssl_viewer.geometry.bearing_deg_from_en(east_m: float, north_m: float) → float | None[source]¶
ssl_viewer.geometry.endpoint_from_array_az_el(lon0: float, lat0: float, array_x_heading_deg: float, array_azimuth_deg: float, array_elevation_deg: float, ray_length_m: float, source_z_m: float) → tuple[list[float], float | None][source]¶

Convert planar-array az/el to a world-space ray endpoint.

Assumptions:

  • local +x lies in the ground plane and has heading array_x_heading_deg

  • local +y lies in the ground plane and is 90 deg CCW from +x

  • local +z is world up

Array azimuth/elevation convention:

  • azimuth is CCW from local +x in the local x-y plane

  • elevation is above the local x-y plane toward +z

Local ray:

x = cos(el) * cos(az) y = cos(el) * sin(az) z = sin(el)

ssl_viewer.geometry.heading_unit(heading_deg: float) → tuple[float, float][source]¶

0 deg = north, 90 deg = east, clockwise positive. Returns (east, north).

ssl_viewer.geometry.make_arrow_polygon(lon0: float, lat0: float, heading_deg: float, z_m: float, tail_offset_m: float, shaft_len_m: float, shaft_half_w_m: float, head_len_m: float, head_half_w_m: float) → list[list[float]][source]¶
ssl_viewer.geometry.offset_m_to_lnglat(lon0: float, lat0: float, east_m: float, north_m: float) → tuple[float, float][source]¶
ssl_viewer.geometry.pos_from_forward_right(lon0: float, lat0: float, heading_deg: float, forward_m: float, right_m: float, z_m: float = 0.0) → list[float][source]¶
ssl_viewer.geometry.pos_from_local_en(lon0: float, lat0: float, east_m: float, north_m: float, z_m: float = 0.0) → list[float][source]¶
ssl_viewer.geometry.wrap_360(x: float) → float[source]¶
